artifact_abi.prototype: void tcrv_emitc_pre_realized_body_product_reduce_dequant_clamp_kernel_pre_realized_body_rvv_product_reduce_dequant_clamp(const int8_t *lhs, const int8_t *rhs, const int32_t *acc, float scale, float lower_bound, float upper_bound, float *out, size_t n);

dequantization_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv dequantization body/config/runtime scale facts
dequantization_boundary.source: selected tcrv.exec RVV variant -> typed tcrv_rvv product/reduction/dequantize/clamp body/config/runtime-scale/runtime-bound facts -> RVV provider route facts -> statement plan -> emitted product, reduction, conversion, scale, lower/upper clamp/select, and store intrinsics -> runtime-callable artifact ABI

statement_plan.family: product-reduction runtime-scale f32 dequantization plus f32 clamp

harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.dequantization_contract: signed i8 products reduce through an i32m1 vector carry, extract one post-loop scalar, multiply by the runtime scale parameter, apply runtime lower/upper clamp bounds, and store only out[0] through the generated external ABI

packed_i4_reference_oracle.reference: scalar sign-extend low/high i4 nibbles from each packed byte, accumulate low and high products per byte, then apply runtime f32 scale and runtime lower/upper clamp
packed_i4_reference_oracle.source: provider-owned low-precision resource metadata selected signed packed-i4 nibbles

harness.product_distinguishing_contract: multi-byte packed-i4 cases include mixed-sign low/high nibble products so the oracle distinguishes true signed packed unpack from byte-wise i8 multiplication, unsigned nibble interpretation, low-only reduction, high-only reduction, add-only, and missing-seed behavior
harness.product_reduction_contract: two signed i4 lanes packed in each int8_t source byte are sign-extended before two widening product/reduction steps feed the i32 scalar seed
harness.scalar_result_contract: only out[0] is written after runtime-scale f32 dequantization and runtime lower/upper clamp, and tail/non-scalar output slots preserve sentinels
harness.select_coverage_contract: post-reduction scalar clamp cases execute lower-clamped, in-bound, and upper-clamped results across ordered runtime bound pairs
harness.source_pattern_contract: two signed int8 source patterns are executed for every runtime count and source/accumulator buffers are preserved
harness.tail_lane_contract: non-scalar output slots preserve their f32 sentinels

local_bundle_generation.realization_boundary: public selected lowering-boundary materialization consumed the pre-realized typed tcrv_rvv body before provider route construction

widening_product_reduction_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv low-precision product-reduction body/config/runtime facts
widening_product_reduction_boundary.empty_count_behavior: runtime loop skipped after local seed initialization; final post-loop f32 scalar store still writes out[0], and output tail sentinels are preserved

generated_artifact_resource_schedule_evi.authority: RVV provider-owned low-precision realization schedule facts

packed_i4_resource_remediation_evidence.reference_oracle_source: provider-owned packed-i4 operand form and remediation metadata, not artifact path/name metadata
packed_i4_resource_remediation_evidence.source: validated object/header low-precision resource mirrors for the provider-selected packed-i4 resource

generated_artifact_resource_schedule_evi.source: generated object/header bundle metadata after RVV provider route construction and target artifact validation

result_type_policy.layout: post-loop f32 clamped dequantized scalar-result store

widening_product_reduction_boundary.source: typed tcrv_rvv.widening_product + standalone_reduce + Gearbox cross-region handoff + dequantize + compare/select body/config/runtime-scale/runtime-bound facts -> contraction, dequantization, resource, multi-with_vl handoff, and clamp route-family plans -> target-owned product-reduction/dequant-clamp validator -> neutral EmitC materializer -> generated RVV C artifact

statement_plan.family: widening product-reduction dequantization contraction with signed packed-i4 nibble unpack

target_validator_consumed_facts: runtime ABI order and roles
route operand binding plan and exact binding summary
i8 source / i16 product / i32 result dtype chain
product and widening reduction relation
accumulator/result layout
source/result memory form
setvl/VL control and scalar store VL
required headers and C type mapping
mirror-only candidate metadata
stale dot or non-family fact rejection
Gearbox producer and nested consumer with_vl scopes
Gearbox cross-region handoff contract and VL/AVL source
low-precision resource selection and two-vsetvl-region budget
provider-owned realization decision, realized region/live-vector schedule, and product/dequant marker phases
dequant-store consumer marker and post-loop f32 store ABI
generated header/object ABI agreement for lhs,rhs,acc,scale,lower_bound,upper_bound,out,n
packed-i4 operand form, signedness, storage/effective width, layout, and unpack intent
packed lhs/rhs source-vector loads
low/high nibble sign-extension statement payload
low/high widening product and reduction carry chain
final carry assignment into dot_acc_vec
